title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Brigade Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Brigade Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Brigade Group are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Brigade Group:
Brigade Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group!
